# Flixu Translate
> Context-Aware AI Translation for teams that care about voice, terminology, and precision.

Flixu is an AI-native translation infrastructure. It merges the capabilities of a modern Translation Management System (TMS) with a dynamic LLM pipeline.

## Features
- Semantic Translation Memory (Precision TM with 4096-dimensional vectors and 8B-parameter reranking)
- Algorithmic Brand Voice Constraints
- Output-Only Billing
- Multi-LLM Routing (6 distinct LLMs)
- Visual Quality Scoring
- Document Parsing (DOCX, SRT, PO, XLIFF)

## Quick Links
- [Sign Up](https://app.flixu.ai/sign-up)
- [Pricing](https://flixu.ai/pricing)
- [API Documentation](https://flixu.ai/api)

## Pricing
- **Free**: $0 (30k characters/mo)
- **Individual**: $39/mo (300k characters/mo, Semantic TM)
- **Team**: $149/mo (1M characters/mo, Shared Resources, 5 Seats)
- **Business**: $449/mo (3M characters/mo, API, 10 Seats)
- **Enterprise**: Custom (Unlimited)
